name: velo
description: Velo — outbound-native CRM for high-velocity sales teams

scripts.lint: eslint src tests e2e vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts --cache --cache-location node_modules/.cache/eslint/
scripts.lint:fix: eslint src tests e2e vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts --cache --cache-location node_modules/.cache/eslint/ --fix
scripts.supabase:deploy:webhooks: supabase functions deploy webhook-subscriptions && supabase functions deploy webhook-worker
scripts.supabase:deploy:integrations: supabase functions deploy api-keys && supabase functions deploy crm-public-api && supabase functions deploy lead-capture && supabase functions deploy lead-capture-tokens
scripts.supabase:deploy:google: supabase functions deploy google-oauth-start && supabase functions deploy google-integration-status && supabase functions deploy gmail-oauth-exchange && supabase functions deploy gmail-refresh-token && supabase functions deploy gmail-disconnect
scripts.supabase:deploy:all-functions: supabase functions deploy api-keys && supabase functions deploy create-org && supabase functions deploy crm-public-api && supabase functions deploy ensure-tenant && supabase functions deploy gmail-disconnect && supabase functions deploy gmail-oauth-exchange && supabase functions deploy gmail-refresh-token && supabase functions deploy google-integration-status && supabase functions deploy google-oauth-start && supabase functions deploy invite-member && supabase functions deploy lead-capture && supabase functions deploy lead-capture-tokens && supabase functions deploy lead-score-maintenance && supabase functions deploy promote-lead && supabase functions deploy resend-send-email && supabase functions deploy sequence-advance && supabase functions deploy track-click && supabase functions deploy track-open && supabase functions deploy webhook-subscriptions && supabase functions deploy webhook-worker
scripts.supabase:webhooks:push: npm run supabase:db:push && npm run supabase:deploy:webhooks
